Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Contaminated ghee to Deities.

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-08-25 · 9 answers
Recently,it has been found that contaminated ghee with beef fat from slaughtered cows,was being used in sacred places like Vrndaban.What do the sastras say in such instance?Did the Lord accept such bhoga?
user [19] · 2007-08-26
what!! any news article related to that?
user [2] · 2007-08-26
if you know hindi:
http://es.youtube.com/watch?v=v8Wjkhf4T-g
if you dont :)
http://www.prabhupada.org/rama/?p=4061
user [157] · 2007-08-26
The Jaganatha Puri temple recently threw away all the days offerings-tons-just because a non-hindu was allowed to enter the temple.They also had special yagnas for purification.This is another extreme in India,as there are also devotees of krsna all over the world,whilst beef eating hindus are allowed in the temple as well as drunkards.
To Abhiram,just google:adulterated ghee for more...
Any comments from leaders???
user [19] · 2007-08-27
that'b4s crazy in jaganat puri.
i know some western devotees who were inside and noone noticed...except for jaganat. And he didnt complain.
user [40] · 2007-08-27
Bhakti Thirta Swami describes going in there in The Black Lotus by Satyaraja Dasa
user [19] · 2007-08-27
yes that'b4s a popular one but i know brahmacaris with dark complexion, not black but brownish that went in without a problem.
amazing mercy eh?
user [40] · 2007-08-27
lucky they come out so we can have darsan, more mercy
user [33] · 2007-08-27
Best to make ghee yourself. That in itself is an act of service and you know it was made with devotion with no contamination.
user [157] · 2007-08-27
The butter that you buy also contains traces of hormones/fertilisers/pesticides and who knows :mad cows disease due to the feeding of cows with slaughterhouse rejects,together with the fear chemicals from slaughtered cows in case the butter also is adulterated with fat!
The answer would be -Prabhupadas dream!- to create self sufficient villages,where all devotee food is produced organically.As its the fashion now to by such food,its also good business.Otherwise well be eating more and more contaminated food,as the food industry giants are out to make maximum money,at any cost.
This site promotes such villages: http://varnasrama.org
